title: Binomial Expansion
description: Pascal's triangle, binomial coefficients, and the binomial theorem for expanding (a+b)^n, including finding specific terms and using the expansion for approximations.
objectives: Construct Pascal's triangle and use it to read off binomial coefficients
Compute binomial coefficients nCr using the factorial formula n!/(r!(n-r)!)
State and apply the binomial theorem to expand (a+b)^n for positive integer n
Find a specific term or coefficient in a binomial expansion without expanding fully
Use the expansion (1+x)^n ≈ 1+nx to approximate values for small x

lessons.title: The binomial theorem and full expansions
